Looking at the ASCII, line 63 is all 'O' (orange). This is the progress bar at the bottom. Previously I was tracking it as 'Y' (yellow), but it's actually 'O' (orange). Let me check the orange elements in the segmentation.
The game seems to have reset after the game_over state. The bottom-right grid is all blue, and the orange bar is at the bottom. I need to figure out the current progress.
Let me check the orange bar length to understand the current state.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("Orange elements:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'O':
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Also check for yellow
print("\nYellow elements:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'Y':
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
